runtime_depth_audit.finding: Upbit PAPER ledger idempotency runtime evidence recomputed ledger rollup counts, but did not independently bind the ledger head cycle to the current persistent loop public-data runtime-depth summary.
runtime_depth_audit.fix: The evidence report now loads the canonical persistent loop report, validates its hash and schema, requires the rollup ledger_head_cycle_id to be present in PASS cycle_results, and blocks missing public input hashes, source/runtime hash mismatch, shallow canonical event depth, and strategy/regime/cost linkage live flags.
